stops.name: Zürich
stops.note: Board the morning train south out of the lake city.

stops.name: Interlaken
stops.note: Step off between the two lakes with the Jungfrau ahead.

stops.name: Grindelwald
stops.note: Hike up the valley beneath the Eiger's north face.

stops.name: Grimsel Pass
stops.note: Drive the hairpins over the high pass in the thin air.

stops.name: Zermatt
stops.note: Wind down the Rhône valley to the foot of the Matterhorn.

stops.name: Montreux
stops.note: Take the lakeside line along Lac Léman's vineyards.

stops.name: Bern
stops.note: Ride the rails home to the arcaded old town.
